hooks.command: bash -c 'if echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" | grep -qE "packages/(daemon|vault-core)/src/"; then echo "⚠️  SECURITY-SENSITIVE FILE MODIFIED. Verify the 6 security invariants in CLAUDE.md: (1) master key never on disk in plaintext, (2) daemon binds 127.0.0.1 only, (3) DNS rebinding protection, (4) bearer tokens hashed before storage, (5) per-key random IVs, (6) vault file contains only ciphertext."; fi'
